connection.autofillConfiguration:
- page: "*.onelogin.com"
  username-field: "#username"
  submit: "button[type='submit']"
- page: "*.onelogin.com"
  username-field: "input[data-testid='username']"
  submit: "button[type='submit']"
- page: "*.onelogin.com"
  password-field: "#password"
  submit: "button[type='submit']"
- page: "*.onelogin.com"
  password-field: "input[data-testid='password']"
  submit: "button[type='submit']"
- page: "*.onelogin.com"
  password-field: "input[autocomplete='current-password']"
  submit: "button[type='submit']"
